issues.title: Misspellings on `spring.io/projects/spring-ai` project page
issues.body: Hi Team- I apologize in advance for filing this issue ticket here, but I am not really sure where to file issue tickets for spring.io now. I searched the repos under the [spring-io](https://github.com/spring-io) org on GitHub (just in case), but I know we switched to **Contentful** awhile back, and the process to edit project pages changed. Anyway... On spring.io/projects/spring-ai, there are few mistakes. First: Should be: "Mistral AI". Second: I think this should read: "model", as in "... the Gemini multi-modal **model** just released by Google,..." Third: I think this would read better as: "**This command** creates a **new** application for **you** to start basic **interactions** with ChatGPT, ..." Otherwise, the Spring AI project page reads well and is informative. Thank you

comments.body:
I couldn't find it either. The data on that page doesn't seem to come from any repository in the [Spring GitHub Organization](https://github.com/spring-projects).

For reference:

[1] https://spring.io/projects/spring-ai#:~:text=Mistal
[2] https://spring.io/projects/spring-ai#:~:text=modal%20modal
[3] https://spring.io/projects/spring-ai#:~:text=for%20your%20to

Hey @jxblum , great to hear from you and glad you keep helping with the project!  
Let me check those Misspellings

> I couldn't find either. The data on that page doesn't seem to come from any repository in the [Spring GitHub Organization](https://github.com/spring-projects).

@codespearhead you are correct, the project's description docs are internal for the Spring team only.

@jxblum I believe i've addressed the mentioned issues: https://spring.io/projects/spring-ai
Also I used the opportunity to update the list of models and vectorstores.
Thank you @tzolov! You are awesome my friend. Changes look great.
